bean_blight.pesticide_name: Copper Hydroxide / Copper Oxychloride / Streptomycin + Copper
bean_blight.precautions: Bactericides are protective; copper may phytotox young foliage at high temps. Wear protective gear; spray in calm wind; avoid drift to water bodies.
bean_blight.if_fails: Switch to resistant cultivars; reduce leaf wetness hours; consider antibiotic where legally allowed; consult agronomist if symptoms spread after two cycles.

bean_fresh_leaf.precautions: No chemical application needed. Scout weekly and maintain nutrition and irrigation.
bean_fresh_leaf.if_fails: N/A — if leaves worsen, run detection again or submit multiple angles.

bean_mosaic_virus.pesticide_name: No curative pesticide — vector management: Imidacloprid / Acetamiprid / Neem Oil
bean_mosaic_virus.precautions: Control aphids/whiteflies with listed options; disinfect tools; uproot highly symptomatic plants to slow spread.
bean_mosaic_virus.if_fails: Confirm virus with testing; manage vectors with IPM; replace seed stock next season.

bean_rust.precautions: Rotate modes of action; avoid spray under drought stress without advisory.
bean_rust.if_fails: Remove heavily infected leaves if permitted; check for alternate host plants nearby; escalate to extension lab testing.

cowpea_bacterial_wilt.precautions: Copper bactericides are protective; avoid high-temperature spray; wear protective gear.
cowpea_bacterial_wilt.if_fails: Use resistant varieties; practice crop rotation; reduce soil moisture; consult agronomist if disease spreads.

cowpea_fresh_leaf.precautions: No chemical application needed. Scout weekly and maintain nutrition and irrigation.
cowpea_fresh_leaf.if_fails: N/A — if leaves worsen, run detection again or submit multiple angles.

cowpea_mosaic_virus.pesticide_name: No curative pesticide — vector management: Imidacloprid / Acetamiprid / Neem Oil
cowpea_mosaic_virus.precautions: Control aphids/whiteflies; disinfect tools; uproot highly symptomatic plants to slow spread.
cowpea_mosaic_virus.if_fails: Confirm virus with testing; manage vectors with IPM; replace seed stock next season.

cowpea_septoria_leaf_spot.precautions: Protect eyes/skin; do not enter treated area until dry; rotate fungicide groups.
cowpea_septoria_leaf_spot.if_fails: Sanitize tools; avoid overhead irrigation; verify strain with lab if lesions persist.

pea_downy_mildew_leaf.precautions: Apply preventively; avoid spray in hot dry conditions; wear protective gear.
pea_downy_mildew_leaf.if_fails: Improve airflow; avoid overhead irrigation; alternate FRAC groups; re-run model on new lesions.

pea_fresh_leaf.precautions: No chemical application needed. Scout weekly and maintain nutrition and irrigation.
pea_fresh_leaf.if_fails: N/A — if leaves worsen, run detection again or submit multiple angles.

pea_leafminner_leaf.precautions: Apply at early larval stage; bee-safe timing; rotate insecticide groups.
pea_leafminner_leaf.if_fails: Use yellow sticky traps to monitor adult populations; apply soil drenches for pupal stages; consult extension.

pea_powder_mildew_leaf.pesticide_name: Sulphur WP/WDG / Tebuconazole / Myclobutanil / Potassium Bicarbonate
pea_powder_mildew_leaf.precautions: Do not mix sulphur with oils; test on a small area in heat; bee-safe timing.
pea_powder_mildew_leaf.if_fails: Improve airflow; alternate FRAC groups; ensure upper and lower leaf coverage; re-run model on new lesions.

soyabean_bacterial_pustule.precautions: Bactericides are protective; apply before infection spreads; copper may phytotox in heat.
soyabean_bacterial_pustule.if_fails: Use resistant cultivars; reduce leaf wetness hours; consult extension for antibiotic options.

soyabean_frogeye_leaf_spot.precautions: Respect resistance management; limit sprays per season per label.
soyabean_frogeye_leaf_spot.if_fails: Increase scouting frequency; remove crop debris; validate disease ID — some spots are nutrient, not fungal.

soyabean_healthy.precautions: No chemical application needed. Scout weekly and maintain nutrition and irrigation.
soyabean_healthy.if_fails: N/A — if leaves worsen, run detection again or submit multiple angles.

soyabean_rust.precautions: Rotate modes of action; avoid spray under drought stress; apply at early pustule stage.
soyabean_rust.if_fails: Remove heavily infected leaves; check for alternate host plants nearby; escalate to extension lab testing.

soyabean_sudden_death_syndrome.precautions: Apply as seed treatment or in-furrow; manage soil drainage; avoid compaction.
soyabean_sudden_death_syndrome.if_fails: Improve drainage; rotate with non-host crops; consult agronomist for soil amendment.

soyabean_target_leaf_spot.precautions: Apply early at first symptom; rotate fungicide groups; calibrate sprayer.
soyabean_target_leaf_spot.if_fails: Remove crop debris; improve canopy airflow; verify ID with lab if lesions persist.

soyabean_yellow_mosaic.pesticide_name: No curative pesticide — vector management: Thiamethoxam / Buprofezin / Diafenthiuron / Neem Oil
soyabean_yellow_mosaic.precautions: Control whiteflies (primary vector); disinfect tools; uproot highly symptomatic plants.
soyabean_yellow_mosaic.if_fails: Confirm virus with testing; use resistant varieties; manage vectors with IPM; replace seed stock.

default.precautions: Always read label for crop and stage; calibrate sprayer; wear protective gear.
default.if_fails: Capture clearer images for the model; combine with field scouting; seek local extension advice.
